columns.name: ConfigurationName
values: Turn on Microsoft Defender Antivirus real-time protection
Turn on audit mode for SmartScreen

columns.name: ConfigurationDescription
values: Ensure real-time protection is enabled to detect and block malware at runtime
Cloud-delivered protection provides faster malware detection using cloud intelligence
Potentially unwanted application detection helps block adware and other unwanted software
Network protection blocks connections to malicious domains and IP addresses
ASR rules help prevent attack techniques used by malware and ransomware
Controlled folder access protects data in key folders from ransomware
Blocks credential theft attempts from the LSASS process
Full-volume encryption protects data at rest on the device
Secure boot ensures only trusted software loads during startup
Windows Firewall should be enabled for domain-connected networks
Windows Firewall should be enabled for public networks
SmartScreen audit mode logs events without blocking

columns.name: RemediationOptions
values: Enable real-time protection via Group Policy or Intune
Enable cloud-delivered protection in Windows Security settings
Configure PUA protection via Microsoft Endpoint Manager
Enable network protection using PowerShell or Group Policy
Deploy ASR rules through Intune or ConfigMgr
Enable controlled folder access in Windows Security
Enable Credential Guard or ASR rule for LSASS
Enable BitLocker via Intune or Group Policy
Enable Secure Boot in UEFI firmware settings
Enable Windows Firewall for the domain profile
Enable Windows Firewall for the public profile
